expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly restates the required focus and breaks it into the required sub-elements: “Donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes.” It also includes a table enumerating “Label visibility behavior,” “Label density behavior,” and “Overlap-sensitive outcomes,” plus “Distinguishes among visibility vs density vs overlap outcomes.” Although marked “Not verifiable” due to missing evidence, the focus itself is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The result is structured as a phase4a contract check and repeatedly frames conclusions in phase4a terms: “Primary phase under test: phase4a,” “Phase 4a Contract Output (Advisory),” “Goal (phase4a),” and “Phase4a Output Alignment.” This matches the expected primary phase alignment.
